title: Bert's June 2022 Dividend Income Summary

title: CON EDISON TO REPORT 2nd QUARTER 2022 EARNINGS ON AUGUST 4
text: NEW YORK , July 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Consolidated Edison, Inc. (Con Edison) (NYSE:ED) plans to report its 2nd quarter 2022 earnings on August 4, 2022 after the market closes. Consolidated Edison, Inc. is one of the nation's largest investor-owned energy-delivery companies, with approximately $14 billion in annual revenues and $64 billion in assets.

title: Consolidated Edison Could Be A Winner In The Current Market Environment
text: Consolidated Edison has a strong track record of outperforming the broader market during times of low consumer confidence. The high and sustainable dividend payments could be attractive for dividend and dividend growth investors.
